RACHEL CHOW

RACHEL CHOW

About

I design with intention and clarity.

I am a UX/UI designer with 6+ years of experience delivering thoughtful digital experiences across the full project lifecycle — from strategic discovery and concept development through high-fidelity design, prototyping, and seamless implementation.

My practice is grounded in deep research, meticulous attention to detail, and close collaboration with product, engineering, and client teams. I bring strong visual sensibility and comfort with contemporary tools including Figma, motion design, and emerging AI-assisted workflows.

I specialise in translating complex brand narratives into elegant, intuitive interfaces for hospitality, professional services, energy, and creative industries — with a particular focus on e-commerce and digital product experiences.

Methodology

A clear, human-centred process from insight to impact.

01
Discovery & Research

Stakeholder interviews, user research, competitive analysis, and brand immersion to uncover the real opportunity.

02
Strategy & Concepts

Design thinking workshops, journey mapping, and concept development that define the strategic direction.

03
Ideation & Wireframing

Rapid sketching, information architecture, and low-fidelity wireframes validated through user testing.

04
High-Fidelity Design

Detailed visual design in Figma with precise typography, spacing, and pixel-perfect high-fidelity outputs.

05
Prototyping & Validation

Interactive prototypes with motion. Usability testing, stakeholder reviews, and iterative refinement.

06
Collaboration & Delivery

Close partnership with product and engineering teams. Detailed handoff and support through implementation.

Full lifecycle ownership
Figma + Motion + AI tools
Self-driven & adaptable

Crafted with intention in Hong Kong.
2025 — Hospitality

Akira Back Hong Kong

Role
Lead UX/UI Designer
Full project lifecycle ownership
The Challenge

Translate the bold, theatrical, multi-cultural dining experience of Akira Back into a digital platform that feels equally luxurious, immersive, and effortless for a discerning international audience.

Key Deliverables
  • • End-to-end user journey mapping
  • • High-fidelity Figma prototypes
  • • Custom motion studies
  • • AI-assisted visual explorations
  • • Developer handoff & QA support
Design Process & Thinking
01 — Discovery

Conducted interviews with diners, front-of-house staff, and leadership. Mapped the emotional arc of a visit. Identified opportunity to bring the “theatre” of the space into the digital journey.

02 — Strategy

Established core design principles: “Dramatic restraint”, “Cultural harmony”, and “Anticipatory service”. Defined a digital experience that feels like a prequel to the physical visit.

03 — Design & Prototype

Built extensive high-fidelity prototypes in Figma featuring elegant micro-interactions for menu exploration and reservation flow. Used AI tools to rapidly iterate moodboards and visual directions.

04 — Collaboration & Impact

Worked closely with the client’s marketing team and external developers. Delivered a live site that perfectly balances minimalism with rich storytelling.

+68% increase in direct reservations in first 4 months
View live site •Tools: Figma, Principle, Midjourney, Webflow
2025 — Lifestyle & Hospitality

Peridot — Sky-High Bar

Role
UX/UI Designer
Strategy through to launch
The Challenge

Create a digital home that captures the unique philosophy of terroir-inspired cocktails, plant-based alchemy, and live music — while delivering a frictionless path to reservation for an ultra-high-end clientele.

Key Deliverables
  • • Brand-aligned visual system
  • • Cocktail & experience explorer
  • • Advanced reservation flow
  • • Parallax & motion design
Design Process & Thinking
01 — Discovery & Strategy

Deep immersion into the venue’s philosophy. Created detailed user personas representing international travellers and local connoisseurs. Defined a narrative-led experience.

02 — Design & Prototyping

Developed a refined dark and light elegant aesthetic with generous whitespace. Built highly interactive prototypes in Figma including dynamic cocktail filters and a real-time availability calendar.

03 — Collaboration

Partnered with the in-house creative team and SevenRooms for seamless reservation integration. Conducted multiple rounds of user testing.

04 — Outcomes

The site quickly became a benchmark for luxury bar experiences in Asia. The digital platform now serves as the primary acquisition channel for the venue.

View live site •Tools: Figma, Framer Motion, Webflow, Midjourney
2025 — Professional Services

Johnson Stokes & Master

Role
UX/UI Designer (Lead)
Website redesign & design system
The Challenge

Modernise the digital presence of one of Hong Kong’s oldest and most respected law firms while preserving its heritage, authority, and understated elegance.

Key Deliverables
  • • Enterprise-grade design system
  • • News & insights platform
  • • Lawyer profiles & search
  • • Accessibility-first architecture
Design Process & Thinking
01 — Research & Strategy

Extensive stakeholder workshops with partners, marketing, and knowledge teams. Competitor analysis of global top-tier firms. Defined the new tone: “Confident humility”.

02 — Execution

Created a comprehensive design system in Figma used across the entire site and future digital touchpoints. Produced high-fidelity prototypes for every major template.

03 — Collaboration

Worked iteratively with the firm’s internal digital team and an external development partner. Delivered detailed documentation and multiple training sessions.

04 — Results

The new site positions JSM as both a contemporary leader and a trusted institution. The design system has become the foundation for all future digital initiatives.

View live site •Tools: Figma, Contentful, Next.js
2025 — Energy & Sustainability

Diamond Generating Asia

Role
UX/UI Designer
Interactive platform & portfolio
The Challenge

Communicate a complex portfolio of power generation assets — both conventional and renewable — in a way that is transparent, inspiring, and easy for investors and stakeholders to navigate.

Key Deliverables
  • • Interactive project map
  • • Data-rich project pages
  • • Sustainability storytelling
  • • Clean corporate experience
Design Process & Thinking
01 — Research & Strategy

Conducted workshops with leadership across Hong Kong and regional offices. Analysed investor needs and regulatory reporting requirements. Established a design language that feels both modern and trustworthy.

02 — Design & Prototyping

Designed a beautiful interactive map experience showing all projects with rich filtering. Built detailed high-fidelity screens in Figma with careful attention to data visualisation.

03 — Implementation

Close collaboration with the engineering team to ensure complex data was delivered elegantly. Delivered a complete design system and extensive documentation.

04 — Outcomes

The new platform has been widely praised for its clarity and sophistication. It now serves as the primary external communication tool for the company’s growing renewable portfolio.

View live site •Tools: Figma, React, Mapbox
2025 — Creative Agency

Thirty30 Creatives

Role
UX/UI Designer & Creative Consultant
The Challenge

Elevate the digital presence of a highly respected creative studio to better reflect the quality of their work with luxury brands, while creating a platform that makes their portfolio easy to explore and their services easy to understand.

Key Deliverables
  • • Refined brand digital identity
  • • Sophisticated project archive
  • • Service & capability pages
  • • Internal tools & guidelines
Design Process & Thinking
01 — Discovery

Reviewed years of award-winning work. Interviewed founders and key creatives. Identified that the existing site didn’t do justice to the level of craft they deliver for clients.

02 — Strategy & Design

Developed a minimalist, fashion-inspired digital language that mirrors their physical studio aesthetic. Designed a flexible project system with beautiful full-bleed imagery.

03 — Prototyping & Handoff

Built comprehensive prototypes with elegant transitions and interactions. Created a complete visual system and component library. Supported the development team through launch.

04 — Impact

The new site has become a powerful new business development tool and accurately reflects the studio’s position at the highest level of the creative industry.

View live site •Tools: Figma, Framer, Webflow, After Effects
